architectureDecision.label: 30-day retention; SHA+version naming
architectureDecision.rationale: GitHub Actions artifact retention 30 days; tarball name includes commit SHA and package version per ready review.

readyReview.decision: 30-day artifact retention; identity is commit SHA plus package version.

technicalBreakdown: Upload package tarball once per release-capable CI run with 30-day retention.
Record artifact name in release evidence manifest for publish lookup.
Verify downstream jobs download without rebuild/repack.

acceptanceCriteria: Package tarball created exactly once in the CI path that needs release/parity validation.
Downstream jobs download tarball without rebuilding or repacking.
Artifact names include commit SHA and package version; retention is 30 days.
Release evidence references artifact identity for publish consumption.
